note: FNV-1a body-geometry fingerprints (geomHash) of retail v1.02 vanilla costume DATs. A vault costume whose detect-outline geomHash matches one of these uses vanilla/recolor geometry and is never Animelee (defensive guard for the Find Animelee detector). Regenerate with scratchpad extract_vanilla.py + `mexcli detect-outline --batch` if the geomHash algorithm changes.
